description: Commands that require interactive input or produce streaming output - documented but not recorded

commands.description: Select kubectl context and namespace via interactive prompts
commands.cli_equivalent: fzf-style context/namespace picker -> saves to config files

commands.description: Configure database connection via interactive prompts
Launch maestro-cli TUI for resource management
Get maestro resource - shows interactive menu if no name argument provided
Delete maestro resource - shows interactive menu if no name argument provided
Delete rows from table - shows preview and requires 'yes' confirmation
Delete all records from all tables - shows counts and requires 'yes' confirmation
Tail adapter logs filtered by cluster ID - streaming output
Create debug pod and exec into it - interactive shell
Run curl from in-cluster pod - may be interactive for responses
Watch cluster conditions with viddy (live updates)
Watch cluster statuses with viddy (live updates)
Watch nodepool conditions with viddy (live updates)
Watch nodepool statuses with viddy (live updates)
Full adapter workflow - creates cluster, waits for adapters, patches, waits, creates nodepool, deletes. Runs until completion.
Simulated workflow showing API-only steps with manual adapter status posts
